setup.instructions: Choose the installation language from the menu, then click the button to run setup phases.
setup.inGuildOnly: This action can only be used in a server.
setup.adminOnlyLanguage: Only the server owner or an administrator can change the installation language.
setup.adminOnlyInstall: Only the server owner or an administrator can rerun the installation.
setup.installError: Error while rerunning installation. Check bot logs.
setup.summary: Guardian setup complete for **{{guild}}**. Guests can be promoted to members after {{delay}}h. Check #regles and #faq to get started.

messageCreate.forbiddenWord: {{user}}, this message contains a forbidden word.

members.welcome: Welcome {{member}} to **{{guild}}**! Click the request button to become a member. You can be promoted after {{delay}}h.

promotion.notInvite: This action is reserved for Invites.
promotion.delayNotReached: You must wait {{remaining}} more hours before applying.
promotion.sponsorshipRequired: A sponsorship is required before applying.
promotion.pendingExists: You already have a pending request.
promotion.requestSubmitted: Your request has been sent to the staff.
promotion.requestAlreadyHandled: This request has already been handled.
promotion.bioModalLabel: Introduce yourself in a few words
promotion.reviewerForbidden: You do not have the required grade to handle this request.
promotion.targetMissing: The target member could not be found.
promotion.acceptedDm: Your request has been accepted. Welcome among the members!
promotion.rejectedDm: Your request has been rejected. Reason: {{reason}}

reports.panelText: Report a member via the Guardian form.
reports.submitted: Your report has been sent to the staff.
reports.alreadyHandled: This report has already been handled.

games.title: Guardian - My game list
games.noneConfigured: No games configured on this server.

settings.gameChannelsHint: Guardian Interface: use the **gamelist:open** button to configure your game channels.
settings.gameListHint: Guardian Interface: click **gamelist:open** then select your opt-in games.

init.faq1: Guardian FAQ: use the setup channel to initialize server modules.
init.faq2: Guardian FAQ: Invite/Member/Moderator/Manager/Owner roles drive permissions.
init.faq3: Guardian FAQ: for support, open a request in #demandes.
init.voiceCreate: Guardian Voice: join this text channel to create your temporary voice channel.
init.configReady: Guardian Configuration: channel #{{channel}} is ready and configured.
init.serverPlaceholder: Guardian Placeholder: this channel is reserved for the future Pterodactyl server management bot.
init.welcomeInfo: Welcome to the server! Read #regles, check the #faq and open a request in #demandes to become a member.
init.rules:
**Server rules**
1. Stay courteous and respectful.
2. No spam or forbidden content.
3. Follow the guidance of Moderators and Managers.
init.announcements:
**Announcements**
Official server announcements will be posted here.
init.suggestionsIntro: Share your ideas to improve the server by creating a new post.
